titleStmt.title: SII 7.264: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 264. (A.R. No. 84-B of 1901). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī Anaṁtanāthāyanamaḥ . śubhakṛtu saṁvatsarada siṁhamāsa 13 neyalu
Ādivāradalu śrīmadanaṁtatī¨rtthēśvarara caityālayadamēlaṇa neleya paḍu
vaṇa dikkina saṁda¨rśakke kuḍaṁgeya baḷiya kuṁḍoḷi nāraṇaseṭṭiyaru taṁna mōkṣā[¨r*]tthavāgi ge
yida kā¨ryya kiṁnikasāmaṁtara saṁmatadiṁdalū samasta halara saṁmatadiṁdalū maṁdarada
nityanaimittika Abhiṣēka pūjā vidhānaṁgaḷige Ācaṁdā¨rkasthāyiyāgi biṭṭa brahmādāya Uci
lada bayalalu heddāriyiṁde paḍuvaṇa gadde 2 kkaṁ bittuva bidekāra 30 lekkada muḍe 140 baḷa 40 Akki mu
ḍe 60 beḷaṁbeṭṭinalū bāgila gadde 1 kkaṁ bittuva bidekāra mūḍe 5 kkaṁ mattaṁ baḍagaṇa dikkina mugera ga
dde 1 kkaṁ bittuva bidekāra mūḍe 3 Aṁtu mū 8 teṁginamaratōṭasahita gēṇi bhaḷa 40 muḍi 30 paḍaṁbū
ri paḍuvaṇa dēvālyada paḍuvaṇa dikkina bāyirigaḷa bage gadde 4 kkaṁ bittuva bidekāra mū
ḍe 4 kkaṁ gēṇi Akki 40 ttara lekkada mūḍe 13 koḷupela bāsupe¨rllāyana kayiṁda biṭā
¨rvvāra hiḍida gadde 7 kkaṁ bittuva bidekāra mūḍe 10 kkaṁ gēṇi Akki baḷa 40 lekkada mūḍe 25 Aṁ
ttu mūḍe 38 mattaṁ Aṁṇakuḷadalu Iraṇiheggaḍe baḷiya seṁteṇi saṁkarana kayya biṭā¨rvvāravāgi
hiḍida teṁkaṇa gadde 2 kke bituva muḍe 5 Ā gaddeyiṁda dha¨rmmakke Akki muḍe 22 Aṁtu 40 lekkada Akki muḍe
150 yidariṁda maṁdarakke samastadēhārakke saha Amṛtapaḍige Akki mū 50 mattaṁ nitya paṁcā
mutra Abhiṣēkakke muḍe 18 ratnatrayārādhanege muḍe 15 Aṣṭāhnikakke muḍe 12 hāladhārege
Akki muḍe 10 naṁdādīvige yeṁṇe hāḍa 8 gaṁdhadhūpacūḍasahita muḍe 16 bidireyaruṁ
gaḷa bastiya mēgaṇa nele hāladhārege Akki muḍe 2 Illi keḷagaṇa nale bhavaṁtige Akki muḍe 12
śōḍaśa bhāvaneya nōṁpi 3 kkaṁ Aṁtyamaṁgala habbada poje saha Akki muḍe 6 viśēṣa Ādāya
Akki muḍe 5 Āhāradānakke biṭṭa sthalavāra 5 kkaṁ sodraṁṇa gadde 2 bittuva muḍe 38 gēṇi Akki muḍe 18
Avara paḍuvaṇa gadde 2 kkaṁ gēṇi Akki muḍe 20 Allidda teṁgina marana gēṇi muḍe 12 Aṁtu muḍe 50 I Akkige mane yeThe rest of the inscription is lost.
Digital edition of SII 7.264 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
